items.title: The Atlanta Braves decided to honor a hometown 9/11 hero before their game on the giant screen at Truist Park. Except they used an image of the plane hitting the tower over an American flag.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: India restoring a centuries-old royal kitchen that never stopped serving food
items.dek: The royal kitchen still serves food, but the complex has been worn down by time.
items.body: The royal kitchen still serves food, but the complex has been worn down by time.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Frosting, sprinkles and layers of fun: Giant cake picnic hits Sydney
items.dek: Hundreds of bakers head to Sydney's Botanic Gardens to share and savour their colourful creations.
items.body: Hundreds of bakers head to Sydney's Botanic Gardens to share and savour their colourful creations.
